generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Your local emergency services are being stretched thin by unnecessary drills. While we all want to be prepared, constant civil defense exercises are draining resources that could be used for real crises. It's time to demand accountability from officials who prioritize political theater over actual public safety. #CivilDefense #NationalSecurity
